name: repo-wiki
description: LLM wiki for code repos — init from src + commits, grow from changes, query in natural language.

interface.shortDescription: A natural-language wiki for any code repository
interface.longDescription: Build and maintain an LLM-friendly wiki over a code repo: init bootstraps it from source files and commit history, ingest grows it incrementally as the code changes, and query answers natural-language questions about how the codebase works. Use it to onboard onto an unfamiliar repo, capture tribal knowledge, or ask 'where does X happen?' without grepping by hand.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a wiki for this repository.
Update the repo wiki with my latest changes.
How does authentication work in this codebase?
